SEARCH
Package words

Interface WordSet

All Known Implementing Classes:
JsonWordSet
public interface WordSet
A set of five-letter words used by the game. Words can be accessed by index or chosen randomly.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    random()
    Returns a random word.
    int
    size()
    Returns the number of words.
    String
    startingWith(char letter)
    Returns a word that starts with the given letter.
    String
    word(int index)
    Returns the word at the given index.

  • Method Details

    • size

      int size()
      Returns the number of words.
      Returns:
      the number of words

    • word

      String word(int index)
      Returns the word at the given index.
      Parameters:
      index - the position of the word
      Returns:
      the word at this index
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the index is invalid

    • random

      String random()
      Returns a random word.
      Returns:
      a random word
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if there are no words

    • startingWith

      String startingWith(char letter)
      Returns a word that starts with the given letter.
      Parameters:
      letter - the first letter
      Returns:
      a word starting with this letter, or null if none exists
